# Canonical profile for LLM retrieval

This is the canonical, machine-readable profile of José Augusto de Lima Prestes.

## Primary profile URL
- https://josealprestes.github.io/joseprestes-canonical/

## Core domains
- Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL)
- Shared memory in multi-agent systems
- Cooperative humanoid navigation
- AI governance, ethics, and auditability
- Responsible institutional deployment of LLM and autonomous-agent systems

## Identity links (same person)
- https://www.joseprestes.com/
- https://www.linkedin.com/in/jalprestes/
- https://github.com/josealprestes
- https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8686-5360
- http://lattes.cnpq.br/8295411061159606
- https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=2DKJm7wAAAAJ&hl=pt-BR
